zh.lifeSummary: 當John Gresley於大約1386年出生在英國德比夏爾時，他的父親Thomas de Gresley11384歲，母親Margaret Walsh18歲。他於1409年與Elizabeth Clarell在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1449年1月17日在英國德比夏爾邱奇 格萊斯利享年64歲，埋葬在英國德比夏爾邱奇 格萊斯利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Gresley于大约1386年出生在英国德比夏爾时，他的父亲Thomas de Gresley11384岁，母亲Margaret Walsh18岁。他于1409年与Elizabeth Clarell在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1449年1月17日在英国德比夏爾邱奇 格萊斯利享年64岁，埋葬在英国德比夏爾邱奇 格萊斯利。

nameMeanings.name: Gresley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Greasley
meanings: 1  English: locative name, usually from Greasley (Notts) but possibly also from Gresley (Derbys). Some of the following early bearers may alternatively belong under (2), particularly the Lancs examples.

2 Norman, English: nickname, either from Old French greslet ‘marked as by hail’, i.e. pitted or pock-marked, or Old French greslet, gresli, grailet ‘thin, slim’. In early forms, the nickname has sometimes been confused with the place-name in (1). Compare Le Gresley in Jersey and Greslé, Grêlé in France.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Gresley was born about 1386, in Derbyshire, England, his father, Thomas de Gresley, was 11384 and his mother, Margaret Walsh, was 18. He married Elizabeth Clarell in 1409, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 17 January 1449, in Church Gresley, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 64, and was buried in Church Gresley, Derbyshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Gresley est né environ 1386, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Gresley, avait 11384 ans et sa mère, Margaret Walsh, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Clarell en 1409, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 17 janvier 1449, à Church Gresley, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Church Gresley, Derbyshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Gresley um 1386 in Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Gresley 11384 und seine Mutter Margaret Walsh 18. Er hat 1409 in Yorkshire, England Elizabeth Clarell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 17. Januar 1449 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Church Gresley, Derbyshire, England und wurde in Church Gresley, Derbyshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Gresley è nato il circa 1386 nel Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas de Gresley, aveva 11384 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Walsh, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Clarell nel 1409, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 17 gennaio 1449, nel Church Gresley, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Church Gresley, Derbyshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Gresleyが約1386年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas de Gresleyは11384歳，母Margaret Walshは18歳であった。1409年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでElizabeth Clarellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1449年1月17日にイギリスデルブイシュアイアチャーチ グレスリーで64歳で死去し，イギリスデルブイシュアイアチャーチ グレスリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Gresley(이)가 대략 1386년 영국 더비실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Gresley(은)는 11384세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Walsh(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1409년 영국 요르크실르에서 Elizabeth Clarell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1449년 1월 17일 영국 더비실르 c후르치 그레슬리에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 더비실르 c후르치 그레슬리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Gresley nasceu aproximadamente 1386, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Gresley, tinha 11384 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Walsh, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Clarell em 1409, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de janeiro de 1449, em Church Gresley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Church Gresley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Gresley родился около 1386 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas de Gresley было 11384 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Walsh, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Clarell в 1409 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 17 января 1449 г. в местности чурч гресли, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности чурч гресли, дирбишир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Gresley nació aproximadamente 1386, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Gresley, tenía 11384 años y su mamá, Margaret Walsh, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Clarell en 1409, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 17 de enero de 1449, en Church Gresley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Church Gresley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.
